verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Father I see that You are drawing A line in the sand And I wanna be standing by Your side Holding Your hand So let Your kingdom come Let it live in me This is my prayer this is my plea

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Father I hear it growing louder The song of Your redeemed As the saints of every the nations Are awakening to sing From my heart there comes an anthem O hear the praises ring This is our song a song to our king

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let the worshippers arise Let the sons and the daughters sing I'm surrendering my all I surrender to the King

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord were living in the Satan's Eden He's the worshipped one of this age But the evening light has come to the bride To make an overcomer today We'll not bow down before Him But our lives have been transformed By the Image and the Power of the living God We are that living Word

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Let the worshippers arise Let the sons and the daughters sing I'm surrendering my all I surrender to the King

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: The first one that's born from me Was Cain that's a wicked man Oh but one day the evening light came down And the Abel became born again Now I'm living by the Word The Second Adam down in me As the living Word made manifest I wanna sing till eternity

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Let the worshippers arise Let the sons and the daughters sing I'm surrendering my all I surrender to the King
